'''zhobayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upblowing|upblowing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upblowing|upblowing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhobayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobayithi|zhobayithi]] || [[word:zhobayiji|zhobayiji]] || [[word:zhobayishi|zhobayishi]] || [[word:zhobayiki|zhobayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobayuthuthu|zhobayuthuthu]] || [[word:zhobayujuju|zhobayujuju]] || [[word:zhobayushushu|zhobayushushu]] || [[word:zhobayukuku|zhobayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobayuthu|zhobayuthu]] || [[word:zhobayuju|zhobayuju]] || [[word:zhobayushu|zhobayushu]] || [[word:zhobayuku|zhobayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobayufthuf|zhobayufthuf]] || [[word:zhobayufjuf|zhobayufjuf]] || [[word:zhobayufshuf|zhobayufshuf]] || [[word:zhobayufkuf|zhobayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobayethe|zhobayethe]] || [[word:zhobayeje|zhobayeje]] || [[word:zhobayeshe|zhobayeshe]] || [[word:zhobayeke|zhobayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobayothotho|zhobayothotho]] || [[word:zhobayojojo|zhobayojojo]] || [[word:zhobayoshosho|zhobayoshosho]] || [[word:zhobayokoko|zhobayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobayotho|zhobayotho]] || [[word:zhobayojo|zhobayojo]] || [[word:zhobayosho|zhobayosho]] || [[word:zhobayoko|zhobayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobayofthof|zhobayofthof]] || [[word:zhobayofjof|zhobayofjof]] || [[word:zhobayofshof|zhobayofshof]] || [[word:zhobayofkof|zhobayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobayïfthïf|zhobayïfthïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfjïf|zhobayïfjïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfshïf|zhobayïfshïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfkïf|zhobayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobayïfthïfthïf|zhobayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfjïfjïf|zhobayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfshïfshïf|zhobayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfkïfkïf|zhobayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobayïfthïf|zhobayïfthïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfjïf|zhobayïfjïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfshïf|zhobayïfshïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfkïf|zhobayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobayïfthïf|zhobayïfthïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfjïf|zhobayïfjïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfshïf|zhobayïfshïf]] || [[word:zhobayïfkïf|zhobayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhobayæthæ|zhobayæthæ]] || [[word:zhobayæjæ|zhobayæjæ]] || [[word:zhobayæshæ|zhobayæshæ]] || [[word:zhobayækæ|zhobayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhobayathatha|zhobayathatha]] || [[word:zhobayajaja|zhobayajaja]] || [[word:zhobayashasha|zhobayashasha]] || [[word:zhobayakaka|zhobayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhobayatha|zhobayatha]] || [[word:zhobayaja|zhobayaja]] || [[word:zhobayasha|zhobayasha]] || [[word:zhobayaka|zhobayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhobayafthaf|zhobayafthaf]] || [[word:zhobayafjaf|zhobayafjaf]] || [[word:zhobayafshaf|zhobayafshaf]] || [[word:zhobayafkaf|zhobayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhobayasha|zhobayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhobayshësha|zhobayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhobayrosha|zhobayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhobaymusha|zhobaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhobayasha|zhobayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhobaynkshësha|gozhobaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhobaynkrosha|gozhobaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhobaynkmusha|gozhobaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhobaynkyasha|gozhobaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhobabayasha|zhobabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhobabayshësha|zhobabayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhobabayrosha|zhobabayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhobabaymusha|zhobabaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhobabayasha|zhobabayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhobabaynkshësha|gozhobabaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhobabaynkrosha|gozhobabaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhobabaynkmusha|gozhobabaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhobabaynkyasha|gozhobabaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhebæyasha|zhebæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhebæyshësha|zhebæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhebæyrosha|zhebæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhebæymusha|zhebæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhebæyasha|zhebæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhebæynkshësha|gozhebæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhebæynkrosha|gozhebæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhebæynkmusha|gozhebæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhebæynkyasha|gozhebæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhobfayasha|zhobfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhobfayshësha|zhobfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhobfayrosha|zhobfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhobfaymusha|zhobfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhobfayasha|zhobfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhobfaynkshësha|gozhobfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhobfaynkrosha|gozhobfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhobfaynkmusha|gozhobfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhobfaynkyasha|gozhobfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
